title: Device Home Screen - Limited Support Before Launch Date
scenario: Show limited support message when current date is before device launch date
steps: 1. Set the device's current date to a date before the device's launch date.
3. Tap the info icon on the home screen.
5. Tap outside the pop-up to dismiss it.
expected: A pop-up displays the message: "Device support coming soon. In-app functionality may be limited." when tapping the info icon. The pop-up can be dismissed by tapping outside of it.
